### RANGE MAX
Returns the maximum (end) value of a date_range. For a date_range [x, y), it returns y.

```esql
FROM decades
| WHERE decade == 1900
| EVAL max_bound = RANGE_MAX(date_range)
| KEEP date_range, max_bound
```
